description: Batch Spark job definition — specifies a main Python/Scala/R file, command-line arguments, and Spark configuration. Runs on Fabric's Spark engine. Use for scheduled or on-demand batch processing (ETL, ML training, data transformation).

definition_parts.description: Job configuration with mainFile, args, language, spark conf

notes: getDefinition/updateDefinition use type-specific endpoints (not generic items)
Format auto-detected as SparkJobDefinitionV2 when .platform lacks definitionFormat
Definition JSON includes mainFile path, arguments array, language, and Spark properties
